description_long: This is a single brown leather dress shoe with a classic, streamlined silhouette and a slightly pointed toe. The upper is made of smooth, matte-finished leather with subtle stitching details along the sides and around the heel. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with thin, round brown laces threaded through four pairs of eyelets. The interior lining appears to be a dark blue fabric, providing a contrast to the exterior. The sole is flat and light-colored, likely made of rubber or synthetic material, and the heel is modest in height. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior surfaces.
description: A brown leather dress shoe with a classic design, featuring criss-cross laces, a smooth matte finish, and a light-colored flat sole.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the rounded heel, subtle stitching, and the dark blue interior lining.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the smooth brown leather upper, stitching details, and the flat, light-colored sole.
description_view_2: Front three-quarter view displaying the pointed toe, criss-cross lacing, and the overall streamlined shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile emphasizing the clean lines, heel construction, and the contrast between the upper and the sole.
